name: Arrow Electronics, Inc
h1: Arrow Electronics's GCC footprint in India
lede: Arrow Electronics runs eight centers across seven Indian cities. Bengaluru, Ahmedabad, Chennai, Hyderabad, Indore, Noida and Pune, covering GCC/GIC and engineering & design, built over 24 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Arrow Electronics office in India. We map eight, across seven cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Arrow Electronics, Inc GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Arrow Electronics runs 8 verified centers across 7 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Ahmedabad, Chennai, Hyderabad, Indore, Noida, Pune), covering GCC/GIC and engineering & design. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership

titles.title: Vice President & Head - Global Enterprise Services Center

about.description: Arrow Electronics's India footprint covers Bengaluru, Ahmedabad, Chennai, Hyderabad, Indore, Noida and Pune, spanning GCC/GIC and engineering & design. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, HR and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all nine decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.a: Arrow Electronics operates 8 active centers in India.
